name: Staveley

locations.address:
Chesterfield Police Station,
Beetwell Street,
Chesterfield

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area includes Staveley. It is covered by the Chesterfield North Safer Neighbourhood Policing Team and belongs to the Chesterfield Local Policing Unit.

Staveley town centre is located five miles from Chesterfield Town Centre and geographically is in the centre of a rejuvenation project called the Markham Vale Development. The town council offices are located on the High Street, Staveley.
